basic_details.job_title: Hamirpur District Tehsildar Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Hamirpur District Tehsildar Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Hamirpur District Tehsildar Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Must have rendered minimum 5 years services in any wing of revenue Department of HP and having no departmental/disciplinary proceeding pending against them.
qualification.details: Must have rendered minimum 5 years services in any wing of revenue Department of HP and having no departmental/disciplinary proceeding pending against them.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Hamirpur District Tehsildar Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Hamirpur District Tehsildar Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Hamirpur District Tehsildar recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Hamirpur District Tehsildar recruitment is 18th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Tehsildar in Hamirpur District.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Tehsildar.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Tehsildar post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 70,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 65 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for the Tehsildar post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have rendered a minimum of 5 years of service in any wing of the revenue department of Himachal Pradesh and should not have any departmental or disciplinary proceedings pending against them.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Tehsildar post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on the recommendations of the committee.

faq.question: Q10. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Hamirpur District in Himachal Pradesh.
